lwdataexplorer 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Exploring Acoustic data
    • Exploring Batcorder data
    • Exploring buoy data
    • Exploring cetaceans and sonar high frequency data
    • Exploring CTD data
    • Exploring fish telemetry data
    • Exploring combined data from different Lifewatch data types
    • Exploring microplankton data - FlowCam
    • Exploring marine genomic observation data
    • Exploring MVB data
    • Exploring Sample Library
    • Exploring station data
    • Exploring Traits data
    • Exploring underway data
    • Exploring bird GPS tracking data
    • Exploring zooplankton data

Retrieve an overview of the ETN data.

Source: R/lwdataFunctions.R
listEtnProjects.Rd

Retrieves the name of network/animals? To get an account, register via the Lifewatch RShiny registration webpage.

listEtnProjects(usr = NULL, pwd = NULL, ...)

Arguments

usr

Username to connect to ETN database

pwd

Password to connect to ETN database

...

Reserved for internal use.

Value

Dataframe with name and type of networks.

Examples

listEtnProjects()
#> - Query mode: Post request to OpenCPU server
#> No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
#>                                                                                 name
#> 1                                                                  2011_Bovenschelde
#> 2                                                                         2011_Loire
#> 3                                                                         2013_Foyle
#> 4                                                                          2013_Maas
#> 5                                                                          2014_Nene
#> 6                                                           2015_PhD_Gutmann_Roberts
#> 7                                                               2016_Diaccia_Botrona
#> 8                                                                        2017_Fremur
#> 9                                                                    2020_PhD_Winter
#> 10                                                                     Aberdeen 2017
#> 11                                       Acousic receiver array for the MOVE project
#> 12                     Acoustic array in the Ria de Vigo (Galicia, Spain) since 2024
#> 13   Acoustic data between 2026 and 2028 for rheophilic fish in weir-regulated Meuse
#> 14                                      Acoustic Ecology of Pelagic Fish Communities
#> 15                             Acoustic Monitoring of Bluefin Tuna in the Aegean Sea
#> 16              Acoustic receiver array in the Gudena River, Denmark, from 2004-2006
#> 17                          Acoustic receiver array in the River Hevring (2023-2028)
#> 18              Acoustic receiver array in the Zuidelijke Randmeren, the Netherlands
#> 19    Acoustic telemetry array active since 2019 to track species in Bristol Channel
#> 20    Acoustic telemetry array data for elasmobranch in Northern Ireland (2024-2030)
#> 21   Acoustic telemetry array in the river Oude IJssel (Germany and the Netherlands)
#> 22                      Acoustic telemetry array on the east cost of Corsica, France
#> 23    Acoustic telemetry data for Atlantic cod at an oil and gas platform in Denmark
#> 24         Acoustic telemetry data for blue crab in the S'Ena Arrubia lagoon (Italy)
#> 25          Acoustic telemetry data for coastal fishes in Marintique Island (France)
#> 26    Acoustic telemetry data for European eel (Anguilla anguilla) in the River Test
#> 27       Acoustic telemetry data for Lionfish distribution in Gökova Bay, Aegean Sea
#> 28    Acoustic telemetry data from the Clew Bay and Achill region in west of Ireland
#> 29  Acoustic telemetry data of marine species monitored 6 French offshore wind farms
#> 30                                                   Acoustic telemetry in lake Osby
#> 31           Acoustic telemetry network in the Ecowende wind farm in the Netherlands
#> 32              Acoustic telemetry network in the harbours of IJmuiden and Rotterdam
#> 33     Acoustic telemetry network in the non-tidal River Scheldt and its tributaries
#> 34   Acoustic telemetry network in the North Sea and the Eastern Scheldt (2025-2028)
#> 35   Acoustic telemetry network in the western River Rhine and hinterlands 2025–2026
#> 36      Acoustic telemetry on Atlantic cod in the Horns Rev 2 offshore windmill farm
#> 37   Acoustic telemetry receiver array in Galway Bay and Dunkellin River (2015-2019)
#> 38                         Acoustic telemetry receiver array in Murcia Region, Spain
#> 39            Acoustic telemetry receiver array in the harinxma channel in Harlingen
#> 40               Acoustic telemetry receiver array in the Nederrijn-Lek, Netherlands
#> 41                 Acoustic telemetry receiver array in the North Sea from 2017-2018
#> 42                  Acoustic telemetry receiver array in the Orbetello lagoon, Italy
#> 43    Acoustic telemetry receiver array in the River Warnow (Germany) from 2011-2012
#> 44         Acoustic telemetry receiver array in the Waal river between 2025 and 2027
#> 45               Acoustic telemetry study in the Meuse river basin at Lith and Linne
